title: Issue-specific information releases - Ministry of Education
content:
Ngā tukunga pārongo e hāngai pū ana ki ētahi take

## Issue-specific information releases
Find out about the topics we have released packages of information about, where there is a high degree of public interest.
- Legal and compliance 1
- Policies and regulations 1
- Te pūrongo mō ngā amuamu me ngā maiki i ngā Ratonga Ako Kōhungahunga 2020 2020 Early Learning Services complaints and incidents report This report summarises complaints and incident notifications received by Te Tāhuhu o te Mātauranga | the Ministry of Education in 2020.
This report summarises complaints and incident notifications received by Te Tāhuhu o te Mātauranga | the Ministry of Education in 2020.
- Te Whakahou i te Mahere Mahi mō te Mātauranga o Te Moana-nui-a-Kiwa 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education The 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education was released on 12 July 2023 by the Ministry of Education.
The 2023 Refresh of Action Plan for Pacific Education was released on 12 July 2023 by the Ministry of Education.
- Te tukanga arotake raihana me ngā tūtohu whakapai mō Abbey's Place Childcare Centre Abbey's Place Childcare Centre – Licence review process and recommendations for improvement Review of ways to improve how our agencies identify and respond to suspected child abuse.
Review of ways to improve how our agencies identify and respond to suspected child abuse.
- Te taetae ki te kura Attendance The following Ministry of Education documents have been released in relation to attendance.
The following Ministry of Education documents have been released in relation to attendance.

- Ngā panonitanga ki te tahua pūtea mō ngā Pouhāpai: Pouhāpai, Pouhāpai Reo: Māori Changes to funding for Resource Teachers: Literacy and Resource Teachers: Māori The Minister of Education has decided to reinvest funding from Resource Teachers: Literacy (RT Literacy) and Resource Teachers: Māori (RT Māori).
The Minister of Education has decided to reinvest funding from Resource Teachers: Literacy (RT Literacy) and Resource Teachers: Māori (RT Māori).
- Kura hourua Charter schools These key documents offer background information on charter schools. Charter schools are another type of state-funded school, providing educators and parents with more choice.
These key documents offer background information on charter schools. Charter schools are another type of state-funded school, providing educators and parents with more choice.
- Te marutau ipurangi me te hāpai matihiko mō ngā kura me ngā hōtaka kura Cyber security and digital support for kura and schools programme Digital technologies are a key enabler of education success for ākonga and learners.
Digital technologies are a key enabler of education success for ākonga and learners.
